# Hg Icp Aes

**Summary**: An analytical technique used to detect and quantify heavy metals in water samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] used HG-ICP-AES to determine the concentration of As(III) after filtration.
